name: Solid UI
description: Unofficial port of shadcn/ui and Tremor to SolidJS with copy-paste components built on Kobalte and corvu

description.value: Unofficial port of shadcn/ui and Tremor to SolidJS with copy-paste components built on Kobalte and corvu

active-maintenance.comment: Active - 353 commits, 28 contributors, solidui-cli@0.7.1 released December 2024

framework.comment: Built for SolidJS, works with Vite, SolidStart, Astro, and Tauri

styling-approach.comment: Styled with Tailwind CSS; copy-paste model means styles become your code

component-model.comment: Pre-styled components built on Kobalte and corvu headless primitives; shadcn-style copy-paste model

ssr-compatible.comment: SSR support via SolidStart with cookieStorageManagerSSR for color mode persistence

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - SolidJS library, not React

design-system.comment: Port of shadcn/ui design system and Tremor dashboard components to SolidJS

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode via Kobalte ColorModeProvider with system preference detection and manual toggle

theming-system.comment: CSS variable-based theming inherited from shadcn/ui design

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS custom properties for theming via data attributes (data-kbTheme)

design-tokens.comment: Inherits shadcn/ui design token approach with Tailwind CSS configuration

rtl-support.comment: RTL support inherited from Kobalte's I18nProvider

component-count.comment: 50+ components including Accordion, Alert, Avatar, Badge, Breadcrumb, Button, Card, Carousel, Charts, Checkbox, Collapsible, Combobox, Command, Context Menu, Data Table, Date Picker, Dialog, Drawer, Dropdown Menu, and more

text-input.comment: Text Field component for text input

multi-select.comment: No dedicated multi-select component; standard Select is single-select

pin-input.comment: OTP Field component for PIN/OTP input with individual digit boxes

color-picker.comment: Not listed in components; Kobalte has color picker but not ported to Solid UI

date-picker.comment: Date Picker component built using Ark UI with calendar interface and range support

date-range-picker.comment: Date Picker supports range selection with preset options

button-groups.comment: Toggle Group component for grouped buttons

split-button.comment: Not provided, but can be composed with Dropdown Menu

table.comment: Table component for basic data tables

data-table.comment: Data Table component with sorting, filtering, and pagination

badge.comment: Badge and Badge Delta components for status indicators

tag-chip-pill.comment: Badge can serve as tag/chip but no dedicated component

timeline.comment: Timeline component for vertical event timelines

calendar.comment: Date Picker has calendar but no standalone calendar display component

toast-notification.comment: Two toast options: Sonner (solid-sonner) and Toast component from Kobalte

progress-bar.comment: Progress component for linear progress indicator

progress-circle.comment: Progress Circle component for circular progress indicator (from Tremor)

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog and Alert Dialog components with Kobalte primitives

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer (using corvu) and Sheet components for slide-in panels

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown Menu component with keyboard navigation

context-menu.comment: Context Menu component for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: Command component using cmdk-solid for Cmd+K style command palette

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs component is horizontal; vertical orientation not explicitly documented

navigation-menu.comment: Navigation Menu component with dropdown support

sidebar.comment: Sidebar component for collapsible side navigation

aspect-ratio.comment: Aspect Ratio component for maintaining proportions

splitter.comment: Resizable component can be used for split panes

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations

chart-libraries.comment: Built-in Charts component using Chart.js; supports Bar, Bubble, Donut, Line, Pie, PolarArea, Radar, and Scatter charts

form-libraries.comment: No official form library bindings; works with Modular Forms via Kobalte's integration

animation-libraries.comment: No specific animation library integration documented; Carousel uses Embla Carousel

icon-libraries.comment: Uses Lucide icons in examples; compatible with any icon library

date-libraries.comment: Date Picker uses Ark UI's built-in date handling

aria-compliant.comment: Built on Kobalte and corvu which follow WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation inherited from Kobalte and corvu primitives

screen-reader-tested.comment: Not explicitly documented; relies on underlying primitive libraries

focus-management.comment: Focus management inherited from Kobalte and corvu (focus trapping, focus restoration)

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG level documented; follows WAI-ARIA patterns via primitives

accessibility-rating.comment: Good - Built on Kobalte and corvu which are accessibility-focused; inherits WAI-ARIA compliance, keyboard navigation, and focus management

bundle-size-full.comment: Not applicable - copy-paste model; components become part of your codebase, not npm dependencies

bundle-size-core.comment: Not applicable - copy-paste model; only include components you use

tree-shakeable.comment: Copy-paste model means only used components are included; no library overhead

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior (Kobalte, corvu)

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy loaded as they're individual files in your codebase

documentation-quality.comment: Good - comprehensive component docs with code examples, installation instructions, dark mode guides for multiple frameworks

figma-kit.comment: Figma UI Kit available via Figma Community (open-sourced by Pietro Schirano), inherits shadcn/ui design

cli-generator.comment: solidui-cli for initializing projects and adding components: npx solidui-cli@latest init/add

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~114 weekly downloads for solidui-cli; copy-paste model means low CLI downloads expected

commercial-support.comment: Open source MIT licensed; no commercial support tier

style-override.comment: Full control via Tailwind classes and CSS variables; copy-paste model means direct source code modification

compound-components.comment: Compound component pattern inherited from Kobalte (e.g., Dialog.Root, Dialog.Trigger)

render-props.comment: Uses children composition pattern rather than render props

slots.comment: Uses compound component pattern rather than named slots

unstyled-mode.comment: Pre-styled with Tailwind; use underlying Kobalte/corvu directly for unstyled primitives
